# Monorail
> Server-Driven UI framework for Laravel + Inertia.js + React

## Documentation

### Introduction

- [Overview](https://monorail.dev/docs/README)

### Getting Started

- [Installation](https://monorail.dev/docs/getting-started/installation)
- [Quick Start](https://monorail.dev/docs/getting-started/quick-start)

### Panels

- [Panel Configuration](https://monorail.dev/docs/panels/configuration)
- [Configuration Reference](https://monorail.dev/docs/configuration)

### Resources

- [Resources](https://monorail.dev/docs/resources/overview)
- [Custom Resource Pages](https://monorail.dev/docs/resources/custom-pages)
- [Relation Managers](https://monorail.dev/docs/resources/relation-managers)

- [Forms](https://monorail.dev/docs/forms/fields)
